name: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners
analysis: CCEP has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $95.9194. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
